channel.title: Liminal Manifold
channel.description: New releases and transmissions from Liminal Manifold.

item.title: Frequencies for the Sleepless City
item.description: Hour-long dark ambient mixes for the hours between midnight and dawn. Cyberpunk soundscapes, industrial drones, and rain-soaked frequencies designed for deep focus, night drives, and the space where sleep refuses to come.

item.title: Eat, Sleep, Dream, Repeat
item.description: Six tracks of narcotic ambient electronics. Pudgy Cat's debut full-length is a slow descent into the hypnagogic: the threshold state between waking and sleep where logic dissolves and sound becomes architecture.

item.title: I Have No Mouth
item.description: The debut single from Unlisted Specimens. A track that exists in the cracks between ambient, dubstep, and something that doesn't have a name yet. Available on all major streaming platforms.
